sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50194" key="i)qukrh/demnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰθυ-κρήδεμνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, epith. of ships, prob. <sense id="n50194.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with canvas set</tr_>, Pamphosap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:7:21:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.21.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
